component.name: Synape
component.summary: An AI-powered cross-platform desktop super-app for developers

description.p: Synape is an all-in-one developer desktop app. It brings your entire development workflow into one place — so you can focus on building instead of switching between tools.
Designed to grow with you, Synape continuously expands its capabilities to cover more of what developers need, all from a single unified interface.

ul.li: Claude AI agent with context-aware sessions
REST API client with collections and environments
SQL and NoSQL database explorer and query runner
Remote file explorer (SFTP, FTP, S3, Azure Blob)
